title: Paul Hoffmann and the cutaneous silent period test.
authors: Rodrigues, Paula Raquel do Vale Pascoal
author_string: Fustes, Otto Jesus Hernández, Kay, Cláudia Suemi Kamoi, Lorenzoni, Paulo José, Ducci, Renata Dal-Prá, Rodrigues, Paula Raquel do Vale Pascoal et al.
abstract: We herein present aspects of the biography of Professor Paul Hoffmann, covering his main works, mainly the article describing the cutaneous silent period, a new technique when it was published in 1922, with a review of its importance, its role in clinical neurophysiology, and its clinical application.
